learnings.text: Git substrate sync skill uses content-classifier for Tier 0 filtering. Integration requires sys.path.insert(0, '/path/to/classifier') and importing scan.classify_path, build_manifest functions. No external dependencies like audit-system are required for basic operation.
Mentor escalation uses va_client.py for reverse API communication - mirrors structure of zoputer_client.py but with reversed direction and longer timeouts for complex questions
Pending decisions store uses SQLite constraints for data validation, enabling robust decision tracking across conversations. JSON context structure supports complex escalation scenarios.
